title: 12SPC UMA4 MMA性能评估
render_html:
1.需求描述

在12spc的机器上，实现UMA4的MMA，用于评估算子性能

测试模型

  • llama1-7b：{ 4096， 4096}，{11008，4096}

2.实现方案

需要进行的改动：

  • Host侧
    • 权重tensor的构造需要改为UMA4，左矩阵继续保持UMA
    • 拆分到每个SPC上之后的权重，即W_block，需要进行32对齐
  • Kernel侧
    • ldgmb：针对于每个SPC，比如0-2，每次访问到的region均是0号，即起始地址是0，那么SPC0访问到的就是0，SPC1访问到的也是0，但是实际它需要去处理的是 blockIdx.x * W_block = 352，SPC2需要去访问的是 blockIdx.x * W_block = 352 * 2。
    • 但是对于第二个region，这个起始地址是传进来，然后在里面计算
    • typecast：输出访问是UMA16

3.性能测试（时间单位为ms）

test_case 

TEST(MmaFunc, test_12spc) {
    float mesc = 0.0;
    // constexpr int32_t SPC_NUM = 12;
    EXPECT_TRUE((test_MatMul_FoldW<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(32, 4096, 4096, mesc, 10)));

    EXPECT_TRUE((test_MatMul_FoldW<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(32, 4096, 4096, mesc, 10)));
    EXPECT_TRUE((test_MatMul_FoldW<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(32 * 512, 4096, 4096, mesc, 10)));
    EXPECT_TRUE((test_MatMul_FoldW<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(32, 11008, 4096, mesc, 10)));
    EXPECT_TRUE((test_MatMul_FoldW<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(32 * 512, 11008, 4096, mesc, 10)));
}

numa_vs_uma4_7b

展开源码 
TEST(MmaFunc, test_numa_vs_uma4_7b) {
    float mesc = 0.0;
    // constexpr int32_t SPC_NUM = 12;
    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(1 * 1, 4096, 4096, mesc, 10)));
    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(32 * 1, 4096, 4096, mesc, 10)));
    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(64 * 1, 4096, 4096, mesc, 10)));
    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(128 * 1, 4096, 4096, mesc, 10)));

    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(1 * 1, 4096, 12288, mesc, 10)));
    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(32 * 1, 4096, 12288, mesc, 10)));
    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(64 * 1, 4096, 12288, mesc, 10)));
    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(128 * 1, 4096, 12288, mesc, 10)));

    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(1 * 1, 4096, 22016, mesc, 10)));
    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(32 * 1, 4096, 22016, mesc, 10)));
    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(64 * 1, 4096, 22016, mesc, 10)));
    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(128 * 1, 4096, 22016, mesc, 10)));

    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(1 * 1, 11008, 4096, mesc, 10)));
    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(32 * 1, 11008, 4096, mesc, 10)));
    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(64 * 1, 11008, 4096, mesc, 10)));
    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(128 * 1, 11008, 4096, mesc, 10)));

    // prefill
    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(1 * 512, 4096, 4096, mesc, 10)));
    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(32 * 512, 4096, 4096, mesc, 10)));
    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(64 * 512, 4096, 4096, mesc, 10)));

    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(1 * 512, 4096, 12288, mesc, 10)));
    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(32 * 512, 4096, 12288, mesc, 10)));
    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(64 * 512, 4096, 12288, mesc, 10)));

    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(1 * 512, 4096, 22016, mesc, 10)));
    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(32 * 512, 4096, 22016, mesc, 10)));
    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(64 * 512, 4096, 22016, mesc, 10)));

    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(1 * 512, 11008, 4096, mesc, 10)));
    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(32 * 512, 11008, 4096, mesc, 10)));
    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(64 * 512, 11008, 4096, mesc, 10)));
}

TEST(MmaFunc, test_numa_vs_uma4_70b) {
    float mesc = 0.0;
    // constexpr int32_t SPC_NUM = 12;
    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(1 * 1, 8192, 2560, mesc, 10)));
    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(32 * 1, 8192, 2560, mesc, 10)));
    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(64 * 1, 8192, 2560, mesc, 10)));
    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(128 * 1, 8192, 2560, mesc, 10)));

    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(1 * 1, 2048, 8192, mesc, 10)));
    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(32 * 1, 2048, 8192, mesc, 10)));
    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(64 * 1, 2048, 8192, mesc, 10)));
    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(128 * 1, 2048, 8192, mesc, 10)));

    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(1 * 1, 8192, 14336, mesc, 10)));
    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(32 * 1, 8192, 14336, mesc, 10)));
    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(64 * 1, 8192, 14336, mesc, 10)));
    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(128 * 1, 8192, 14336, mesc, 10)));

    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(1 * 1, 7168, 8192, mesc, 10)));
    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(32 * 1, 7168, 8192, mesc, 10)));
    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(64 * 1, 7168, 8192, mesc, 10)));
    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(128 * 1, 7168, 8192, mesc, 10)));

    // prefill
    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(1 * 512, 8192, 2560, mesc, 10)));
    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(32 * 512, 8192, 2560, mesc, 10)));
    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(64 * 512, 8192, 2560, mesc, 10)));

    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(1 * 512, 2560, 8192, mesc, 10)));
    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(32 * 512, 2560, 8192, mesc, 10)));
    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(64 * 512, 2560, 8192, mesc, 10)));

    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(1 * 512, 8192, 14336, mesc, 10)));
    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(32 * 512, 8192, 14336, mesc, 10)));
    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(64 * 512, 8192, 14336, mesc, 10)));

    EXPECT_TRUE(

    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(32 * 512, 7168, 8192, mesc, 10)));
    EXPECT_TRUE(
        (test_MatMul_FoldW_uma4<S8, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, SPC_NUM, CASE4_TYPECAST_S8>(64 * 512, 7168, 8192, mesc, 10)));
}
